title: {{VENTURE_NAME}} Local Roadmap Extension Schema v1.0
description: Venture-local extension schema for {{VENTURE_NAME}}. Extends the canonical roadmap.json schema with domain-specific fields. Extension fields MUST live under extensions.* — canonical field names are reserved. This schema lives in the venture repo, NOT in schema-registry. See SCHEMA_EXTENSIONS.md for governance rules and the promotion pathway for fields that become cross-venture canonical.

allOf.description: Inherits all canonical roadmap.json schema rules

extensions.description: Venture-specific extension fields for {{VENTURE_NAME}}. Add domain-specific properties here. Do NOT define fields outside of extensions.* — canonical namespace is reserved.

examples.YOUR_DOMAIN_FIELD: Add your domain-specific data here under extensions.*
